title: Shadows Stolen on Thriller Bark: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's safe because it's midnight right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's go make Gecko Moria Regret...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ever picking a fight with us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I didn't know this was a ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He climbed up the mast, master.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BU-BUT, MASTER!! WE CAN'T DO ANYTHING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're gonna need better marios, hogback.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: leave it to me, master. Fosfosfos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I think their fellows woke them up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I think he's filled them in.

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: not to mention the fact that...

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: They all know how to purify zombies!!
